documentation.description: Bit-sized unsigned integer types that don't have to byte-multiple sizes

simple_types.name: Bit_Type
simple_types.code:
type Bit_Type is mod 2 ** 1
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: Eighteen_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Eighteen_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 18
  with Size => 18;

simple_types.code:
type Five_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 5
  with Size => 5;

simple_types.name: Four_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Four_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 4
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: Seven_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Seven_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 7
  with Size => 7;

simple_types.name: Six_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Six_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 6
  with Size => 6;

simple_types.name: Three_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Three_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 3
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: Twenty_Seven_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
type Twenty_Seven_Bits_Type is mod 2 ** 27
  with Size => 27;

simple_types.name: Two_Bits_Type
simple_types.code:
